text: What if I told you pH isn't just a number? pH tracks hydrogen ion activity in solutions. Acids donate, bases accept these ions. But did you know this affects everything from soil to our own bodies? A pH below 7 means more hydrogen ions, indicating acidity. Above 7, it’s basic—more hydroxide ions. So, next time you check pH, remember it’s more than a scale—it’s a balance of ions. Curious about more science mysteries? Hit follow for more!
